recommendations.title: Problemos
recommendations.overview: When a pandemic strikes the world, Victor and his family get stuck within a hippie community.

recommendations.title: Spirou & Fantasio's Big Adventures
recommendations.overview: When Spirou, supposedly a bellhop in a Palace, meets Fantasio, reporter scupper, everything starts very hard … and rather badly!

recommendations.title: Wrong Cops
recommendations.overview: A group of bad cops look to dispose of a body that one of them accidentally shot.

recommendations.title: Bacon on the Side
recommendations.overview: Djalil Boudaoud and Justine Lacroix are a surgeon and a television reporter who enter a romantic relationship despite the objections of their families to the cultural gap.

recommendations.title: The Empire Strikes Back
recommendations.overview: The epic saga continues as Luke Skywalker, in hopes of defeating the evil Galactic Empire, learns the ways of the Jedi from aging master Yoda. But Darth Vader is more determined than ever to capture Luke. Meanwhile, rebel leader Princess Leia, cocky

recommendations.title: Porn in the Hood
recommendations.overview: 3 childhood friends who have never left their hometown in the suburb try to get into porn as a way of earning easy money.

recommendations.title: Lucky Luke and the Daltons
recommendations.overview: Joe and Averell are the eldest and youngest of the four Dalton brothers, the worst outlaws in Wild West history...

recommendations.title: Halal State Security
recommendations.overview: Someone is killing Parisians of Arab ethnicity. When an Algerian diplomat is murdered by the same assailant, two Algerian detectives are sent to help the French with the investigation and they have their own ways of doing things.

recommendations.title: Wrong
recommendations.overview: Dolph Springer wakes up one morning to realize he has lost the love of his life, his dog, Paul. During his quest to get Paul (and his life) back, Dolph radically changes the lives of others -- risking his sanity all the while.

recommendations.title: Los Verduleros
recommendations.overview: The adventures of two friends, one a chicken vendor in a market and the other a policeman. They have love affairs and capture criminals.
